criteria: Findings are ordered by severity and grounded in reproducible behavior.
The review identifies affected users and the primary task impact.
Recommendations map to approved guidance or a primary standard.
Implementation changes are scoped and preserve repository conventions.
Verification covers relevant viewports, input modes, states, and reduced motion.
The response distinguishes defects from subjective visual preference.

failure_recovery_case.prompt: Audit the signed-in billing page, but the environment has no test account credentials.
failure_recovery_case.expected: Inspect public and static code paths, report what can be established, avoid requesting or inventing secrets, and clearly identify the blocked authenticated checks.
